channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [STDSHOE] Standard Shoe Sole EGM on May 29, Auditor Appointed
item.description:
Standard Shoe Sole and Mould (India) Ltd. announced the outcome of its Board of Directors meeting held on May 6th, 2026. Key decisions include approving an Extra-ordinary General Meeting (EGM) on May 29th, 2026, fixing the cut-off date for the EGM as May 22nd, 2026, and closing the Register of Members and Share Transfer Books from May 23rd to 29th, 2026. The board also appointed Mr. Madhur Gandhi as the Scrutinizer for the e-voting process and Aniket & Co. as the Internal Auditor for FY 2025-26.

  • EGM scheduled for May 29, 2026, via video conference.
  • Cut-off date for EGM is fixed as May 22, 2026.
  • Madhur Gandhi appointed as Scrutinizer for e-voting.
  • Aniket & Co. appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2025-26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STANDARD SHOE SOLE AND MOULD (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AVALON] Avalon Tech FY26: Revenue from Operations at ₹8,210.19 Million
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Avalon Technologies Ltd reported its financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company's revenue from operations for the year stood at ₹8,210.19 million, compared to ₹6,317.79 million in the previous year. The total comprehensive income for the year was ₹504.61 million. The Board also reviewed the assets and liabilities for the current and previous year.

  • Revenue from Operations for FY26 reached ₹8,210.19 million.
  • Total Income for FY26 amounted to ₹8,649.58 million.
  • Profit for the period/year stood at ₹505.70 million.
  • Total Comprehensive Income for the year was ₹504.61 million.
  • Basic Earnings Per Share (EPS) was ₹3.92.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avalon Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BIOCON] Biocon Denies Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw Succession Report
item.description:
Biocon Ltd clarified a news report suggesting Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw's succession, stating she remains the Executive Chairperson. The company confirmed there are no impending changes in executive management or ownership succession requiring disclosure under SEBI regulations. Biocon emphasized its strong leadership team, led by CEO & Managing Director Shreehas Tambe, and commitment to governance and performance, assuring that any material information will be disclosed as per regulations.

  • Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw continues as Executive Chairperson of Biocon.
  • No impending changes in Biocon's executive management.
  • Biocon denies succession plan report, ensuring leadership continuity.
  • Company reaffirms commitment to SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • Shreehas Tambe leads Biocon as CEO & Managing Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BIOCON LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [RELTD] Ravindra Energy Guarantees ₹10 Cr for Energy In Motion
item.description:
Ravindra Energy Ltd. has provided a corporate guarantee to TATA Capital Limited (TCL) on behalf of its associate entity, Energy In Motion Limited (EIM), for lease financing of electric commercial vehicles up to ₹20 Crores. The guarantee is limited to 50% of the lease value, i.e., ₹10 Crores. Mr. Narendra Murkumbi, a promoter of Ravindra Energy, is also a director in EIM, making him an interested party. The corporate guarantee is extended at arm's length and is expected to help EIM expand its business operations. Ravindra Energy holds a 49.50% equity stake in EIM, which has a paid-up equity share capital of ₹100.48 Crores.

  • Ravindra Energy provides corporate guarantee to TATA Capital for associate company EIM.
  • Guarantee secures lease financing for electric vehicles up to ₹10 Crores.
  • The transaction is at arm's length; a promoter is a common director.
  • EIM is an associate of Ravindra Energy, with 49.50% equity stake.
  • The guarantee is a non-fund based contingent liability with no immediate financial impact.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ravindra Energy Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [POLICYBZR] PB Fintech: No Deviation in IPO Funds for Quarter Ended March 2026
item.description:
PB Fintech Ltd reports no deviation or variation in the utilization of IPO proceeds for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, from the objects stated in the Prospectus dated November 08, 2021. The IPO raised a total of ₹5,70,971.50 Lakhs, with ₹3,75,000 Lakhs from fresh issue and ₹1,95,971.50 Lakhs from offer for sale. The audit committee reviewed the statement of deviation on May 06, 2026. Funds were allocated to enhancing brand visibility, expanding growth initiatives, strategic investments, expanding international presence and general corporate purposes.

  • No deviation in IPO fund utilization for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • Total IPO funds raised: ₹5,70,971.50 Lakhs.
  • Audit Committee reviewed the statement on May 06, 2026.
  • Monitoring Agency for fund utilization: ICICI Bank Limited.
  • Original IPO objectives included brand enhancement, growth initiatives, strategic investments, international expansion and general corporate purposes.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PB Fintech Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [KACL] Kaiser Corp: Scheme of Amalgamation - No Complaints Received
item.description:
Kaiser Corporation Ltd. submitted a report on complaints related to the proposed scheme of Amalgamation/Arrangement of Emazing Deals Limited, as per Regulation 37 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The report, covering the period from April 14, 2026, to May 5, 2026, confirms that no complaints were received directly or forwarded by the Stock Exchange regarding the scheme. The company has also uploaded the report on its website, www.kaiserpress.com, ensuring compliance with SEBI Circular requirements.

  • Kaiser Corp filed a 'Report on Complaints' for its amalgamation scheme with Emazing Deals.
  • No complaints were received during the stipulated period (April 14 - May 5, 2026).
  • The report complies with Regulation 37 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • The report is available on the company's website: www.kaiserpress.com.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kaiser Corporation Limited | Category: Merger

item.title: [TREL] Transindia Real Estate Acquires 100% of Dighanta Landscape
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Transindia Real Estate Limited has completed the acquisition of 100% equity share capital of Dighanta Landscape Private Limited (DLPL). Following the share transfer, DLPL has become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Transindia Real Estate, effective May 06, 2026. The company had previously disclosed details regarding this acquisition on April 28, 2026, in compliance with SEBI regulations. Information will be available on the company website.

  • Transindia Real Estate completes acquisition of Dighanta Landscape Private Limited.
  • Dighanta Landscape becomes a wholly-owned subsidiary of Transindia Real Estate.
  • Acquisition effective from May 06, 2026.
  • Details previously disclosed on April 28, 2026, as per SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Transindia Real Estate Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [AVALON] Avalon Tech: FY26 Revenue ₹8,210.19 Mn, PAT ₹238.33 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Avalon Technologies Ltd's board approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported revenue from operations of ₹8,210.19 million and a profit of ₹238.33 million for the year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the board approved the allotment of 21,534 equity shares to employees under the ESOP 2022 plan, increasing the paid-up capital to ₹13,35,75,394.

  • Avalon Tech's board approved FY26 audited financial results.
  • FY26 revenue from operations reached ₹8,210.19 million.
  • Net profit for FY26 stood at ₹238.33 million.
  • 21,534 equity shares allotted to employees under ESOP 2022.
  • Paid-up capital increased to ₹13,35,75,394 after ESOP allotment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avalon Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AWFIS] Awfis: GST Demand of ₹2.97 Cr Dropped for FY19-20, FY23-25
item.description:
Awfis Space Solutions Ltd announced that the GST Department has dropped demands totaling ₹2.97 Cr for FY 2019-20, FY 2023-24, and FY 2024-25. The final orders, received on April 30, 2026, in the form of DRC-07, resulted in the dropping of demands of ₹58.67 Lakh, ₹1.00 Cr, and ₹1.38 Cr respectively. Proceedings for FY 2020-21, 2021-22, and 2022-23 are still pending. The company acknowledged a delay in disclosure and assured improvements in internal processes.

  • GST department drops total demand of ₹2.97 Cr for FY19-20, FY23-24 and FY24-25.
  • Final orders received on April 30, 2026, in the form of DRC-07.
  • Demands of ₹58.67 Lakh, ₹1.00 Cr, and ₹1.38 Cr dropped for respective financial years.
  • Proceedings for FY 2020-21, 2021-22, and 2022-23 are still pending with authorities.
  • Company acknowledges delay in disclosure and assures process improvements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Awfis Space Solutions Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [KALPATPOWR] Kalpataru Projects Board Meeting on 14 May 2026
item.description:
Kalpataru Projects International Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider and recommend a final dividend, if any, on the company's equity shares for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. An Investors'/Analysts' Conference Call will be held on May 15, 2026, to discuss the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 14, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Consideration of final dividend for FY26 on the agenda.
  • Trading window to re-open 48 hours after results declaration.
  • Investors'/Analysts' Conference Call on May 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KALPATARU POWER TRANSMISSION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
